scripts.serve:contentstack: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch contentstack --ext js,jsx --exec "node --loader @esbuild-kit/esm-loader contentstack/server/index.js"
scripts.serve:commercetools: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch commercetools --ext js,jsx --exec "node --loader @esbuild-kit/esm-loader commercetools/server/index.js"
scripts.serve:agility: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch agility --ext js,jsx --exec "node --loader @esbuild-kit/esm-loader agility/server/index.js"
scripts.serve:test-data: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch test-data --ext js,jsx --exec "node --loader @esbuild-kit/esm-loader test-data/server/index.js"
